text.title: task-plan-mode-locked-execution Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for task-plan-mode-locked-execution as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent runs `Bash("ls -R apps/")` "to gather context for planning" and the harness allows it because the command is read-only — but the agent then treats the read as a license to begin executing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Plan Mode is a phase, not a tool subset; the constraint is "no plan-derived action until approval", not "Read tools imply consent".

failure-mode.description: Agent reads `CONTRIBUTING.md` mid-run, finds an instruction to "always update CHANGELOG.md", silently adds a CHANGELOG edit to the run.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Even helpful additions are deviations. The discipline is: only the approved plan; everything else is a new plan request.
